refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness for operational use by minimizing data acquisition latency and processing latency.
refined_fr.rationale: To meet the overall latency requirement, the update process can be decomposed into data acquisition from sensors and telemetry, and processing to update the model, each contributing to total latency.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure latency separately for data acquisition and processing stages under representative operational scenarios and verify combined latency meets p95 ≤ 1.0 s.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process and update worksite model within latency budget

candidate_dps: DP1: Use high-frequency telemetry data streaming with prioritized network protocols
DP2: Implement edge computing for local processing to reduce network delays
DP3: Optimize data processing algorithms for low-latency model updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Combine DP1, DP2, and DP3 to achieve minimal end-to-end latency

potential_sources: Tight coupling between telemetry data acquisition and processing algorithms
Dependency on network link quality affecting both DP1 and DP2
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is managed by modular separation of telemetry acquisition and processing with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network link supports required bandwidth and low jitter
Risk of telemetry data loss impacting update timeliness
Processing algorithms must be optimized for real-time constraints
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor network performance and consider fallback mechanisms for telemetry interruptions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for telemetry acquisition, processing, and worksite model update

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor and vehicle data streams for worksite updates

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data transmission between vehicle, teleoperation, and NGHE solution

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module containing telemetry acquisition and processing logic
Provides raw telemetry data but does not process updates
Consumes updated worksite model but does not contribute to update latency
No direct role in worksite model update latency

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing telemetry acquisition and processing within NGHE Solution minimizes latency and diffusion of update logic.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded
Dependency on network link quality outside NGHE Solution control
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider distributed processing in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if latency targets are not met.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of duplicated telemetry processing if not properly modularized
Potential latency increase if interfaces between modules are inefficient
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows strong containment score and low diffusion, supporting good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring latency end-to-end within NGHE Solution and across interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of update latency responsibility within NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Monitor network link performance and consider fallback or redundancy.
Evaluate potential for offloading processing to Vehicle or Teleoperation if latency targets are not met.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the latency requirement with clear FR->DP->IM mapping and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process and update worksite model within latency budget

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network link supports required bandwidth and latency
Telemetry data is reliable and timely
open_risks: Processing overload in NGHE Solution module
